title: No Objection Letter (NOL) Requirement in the Transfer of
content: 40 Accreditation and Enrollment of a Ship. In any transfer of accreditation and/or 41 enrollment of ship/s, the Department shall require a no objection letter from the transferor 42 agency. 43 44 Any transfer of enrollment of a specific department for cruise/passenger ship or other 45 ships with special operations would require the submission of an NOL only from the 46 affected or concerned transferor agency. The other unaffected departments enrolled to 47 other LMAs within the same cruise/passenger ship or other ships with special operations 48 shall not be required to submit the NOL under this Section. 49 50
